benefits.description: Tirz absolutely crushes hunger and causes disgust toward snacks and alcohol; sema and lira had some suppression effect; reta mildly better than sema and lira for hunger suppression

side_effects.description: Excessive sweating on reta — back sweat and swamp ass when sitting too long, especially on flights or long periods of sitting; BO issues
Reta makes user want to snack and drink; no meaningful hunger or appetite suppression compared to tirz

protocol_notes: Has used pharma versions of liraglutide, semaglutide, and tirzepatide, as well as grey market retatrutide. Sema notably tanked LDL and raised HDL. Works from home standing most of the day; travels 1-2 times/month for business. Finds reta significantly inferior to tirz for appetite suppression and overall effectiveness. Considers reta mildly better than sema/lira but not by much.
